description: Remedial action interface specifying a direct action on the network

id.description: The unique identifier of the remedial action

name.description: The name of the remedial action

operator.description: The operator of the remedial action

speed.description: The time it takes to trigger the remedial action

terminalsConnectionActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new connection state of an element's terminals

phaseTapChangerTapPositionActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new tap position of a phase tap changer

generatorActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new active power setpoint of a generator

loadActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new active power setpoint of a load

shuntCompensatorPositionActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new position of a shunt compensator

switchActions.description: The list of actions that specify the new state of a switch

switchPairs.description: The list of pairs of switches to be operated together, in opposite ways

onInstantUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined at a given instant

onContingencyStateUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined on a given state

onConstraintUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined at a given instant for a given CNEC

onFlowConstraintInCountryUsageRules.description: The list of usage rules defined on a given country, triggered when a flow CNEC of that country is constrained
